from manim import *

class UnitCircle(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Section 1 — Setup
        title = Text("Unit Circle and Trigonometric Functions", font_size=36, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(title))

        circle = Circle(radius=1.0, color=WHITE, fill_opacity=0.0, stroke_width=4)
        self.play(Create(circle))
        self.wait(0.5)

        # Section 2 — Main concept
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[-4, 4, 1], y_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 0.5],
            x_length=8, y_length=3,
            axis_config={"color": GRAY, "include_numbers": True},
        )
        labels = axes.get_axis_labels(x_label="x", y_label="sin(x) / cos(x)")
        self.play(Create(axes), Write(labels))
        self.wait(1)

        sine_graph = axes.plot(lambda x: np.sin(x), color=BLUE, x_range=[-4, 4])
        cosine_graph = axes.plot(lambda x: np.cos(x), color=RED, x_range=[-4, 4])
        self.play(Create(sine_graph), Create(cosine_graph))
        self.wait(1.5)

        # Section 3 — Conclusion
        sine_label = axes.get_graph_label(sine_graph, r"sin(x)", x_val=-2.5, color=BLUE)
        cosine_label = axes.get_graph_label(cosine_graph, r"cos(x)", x_val=2.5, color=RED)
        self.play(Write(sine_label), Write(cosine_label))
        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
